rationale: In the citing paper, Sethuraman and Srinivasan (2002) appears in Table 2 as one example among many papers that interpreted prior elasticity decompositions as showing strong brand-switching effects. The citation is used illustratively to document a broad pattern in the literature, not as a specific theoretical or methodological basis for the new unit-sales decomposition developed here. The core derivations, empirical studies, and claims in the citing paper do not depend on this particular 2002 article.
